Your Kit (0)

99%+ Purity, Guaranteed

Every compound is verified to 99%+ purity by HPLC and mass spectrometry, and ships with its own Certificate of Analysis. If a batch doesn't meet spec, it never reaches you — that's the guarantee, in writing, on every order.

Third-Party, Locally Tested

We don't grade our own work. Every batch is sent to an independent, locally accredited laboratory for identity and purity analysis — so the numbers you rely on are confirmed by people with no stake in the result.

Specialist Support

Real researchers, not a call centre. Our team talks reconstitution, storage and handling in plain language and replies within one business day — so you order, prepare and store with confidence instead of guesswork.

Research-grade peptides, blends and laboratory supplies. Every compound is supplied strictly for in-vitro and laboratory research use only.
